headlines.description: — Norman Powell scored 32 points while Kel’el Ware had 20 points and 16 rebounds to help the Miami Heat win their fourth in a row with a 127-117 victory over the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Powell, Ware lead Miami Heat to fourth straight win with 127-117 victory over the Philadelphia 76ers

headlines.description: — Jalen Johnson had 28 points, 11 assists and eight rebounds and the Atlanta Hawks won for the seventh time in nine games with a 113-110 victory over the Charlotte Hornets on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Johnson scores 28 and lifts Hawks over Hornets 113-110

headlines.description: — Jaylen Brown scored 35 points and Josh Minott scored 12 of his 16 points in the second quarter when Boston shot 81.8% as the Celtics beat the short-handed Orlando Magic 138-129 on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jaylen Brown's 35 points lead Celtics in a 138-129 victory over the short-handed Magic

headlines.description: — Donovan Mitchell scored 37 points and took over when the game got close, leading the Cleveland Cavaliers to a 120-105 victory over the Los Angeles Clippers on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Donovan Mitchell scores 37 points, takes over in 3rd in Cavaliers' 120-105 win over Clippers

headlines.description: — Scottie Barnes scored 17 points, Ja’Kobe Walter added a season-high 16 and the Toronto Raptors won for the 11th time in 12 games, beating the Brooklyn Nets 119-109 on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Raptors beat Nets 119-109 for 7th straight win, 11th in 12 games

events.name: Portland Trail Blazers at Oklahoma City Thunder

headlines.description: — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 37 points in three quarters and the Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Portland Trail Blazers 122-95 on Sunday night to avenge their only loss of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 37 points, Thunder rout Blazers to avenge only loss

events.name: San Antonio Spurs at Phoenix Suns

headlines.description: — Dillon Brooks scored 25 points, Devin Booker had 24 and the Phoenix Suns won their third straight and ended the San Antonio's three-game streak with a 111-102 victory over the Spurs on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Suns win 3rd straight and end Spurs' 3-game run with 111-102 victory

events.name: Los Angeles Lakers at Utah Jazz

headlines.description: — Luka Doncic had 33 points and 11 rebounds and LeBron James scored 17 points in his first road game of the season as the Los Angeles Lakers beat the Utah Jazz 108-106 on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lakers outlast Jazz 108-106 as Doncic scores 33 and James 17 in his 1st road test of season
